overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing a journey through a stormy, foggy mountain landscape at night. The player walks along ancient cobblestone paths past stone ruins and crosses a weathered stone bridge in heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain path with ancient circular tower ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path with the ancient stone tower visible on the right side

entered.detail: cylindrical stone tower ruins with arched openings and weathered masonry
steep rocky mountain slope covered in patches of grass
wet uneven cobblestone road winding through the mountains
dark heavy storm clouds covering the sky with visible rain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, stormy mountain path at night. The camera moves forward along wet cobblestones with a prominent ancient circular stone tower on the right side. Heavy rain falls through foggy air as the path winds between the tower and a steep mountain cliff on the left.

events.description: passing the ancient circular tower, entering the open mountain valley with cliffs on both sides

agents.ego_description: continuing along the mountain path as the terrain opens into a valley with distant mountains visible ahead

entered.detail: rocky mountain slope that becomes visible after passing the tower
distant stone bridge structure becoming visible at the end of the path

segments.scene_description: Having passed the stone tower, the path continues through a narrow mountain valley with slopes on both sides. The cobblestone road winds toward a distant stone bridge barely visible through the rain and fog. The atmosphere remains dark and stormy with heavy precipitation.

events.description: stepping onto the stone bridge with raised railings on both sides

agents.ego_description: crossing the stone bridge with weathered railings on both sides, heading toward the mountain pass ahead

entered.detail: weathered stone bridge railing with carved details on the left side
weathered stone bridge railing with carved details on the right side
flat stone slab surface of the bridge with water pooling on it

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera crossing an ancient stone bridge with prominent railings on both sides. The bridge surface consists of large flat stone slabs, wet from the storm. Beyond the bridge, the mountain pass continues into the foggy distance as the journey progresses through the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a stormy mountain pass that transitions from a narrow path beside ancient ruins to an open stone bridge. It begins on wet cobblestones under a dark night sky, winding past a prominent circular stone tower while heavy rain and fog cling to a steep cliffside. As the camera moves beyond the tower, the path leads deeper into a narrow valley where the road curves toward a distant structure obscured by the precipitation. The scene then opens as the camera reaches and crosses an ancient stone bridge with heavy railings and flat, rain-slicked slabs. Finally, the movement continues across the bridge and into the foggy distance of the mountain pass.
